ops.text: PHASE D+E DONE @ b98a40474653 (pushed main; Guides lint + codex CI 99s + Guides all green; render commit ca3f652d9201 followed via workflow dispatch). D: --watch [--all] registry stream in registry.go (one JSONL psRecord per run as it settles — anything but pending/running, incl. died; exits when all settled; roots expand to lanes; --all snapshots in-flight runs; rejectOutsideScratch guarded since classify sweeps .tmp) + TestWatchEmitsOnSettleAndExits; Monitor semantics verified from the tool contract (each stdout line = event, exit ends watch, terminal states must always emit). SKILL.md placement rule: top-level = Monitor + --watch (the one place Monitor delivers), owner subagents = await (Monitor wakes dropped in subagents), workflows script-driven, plain subagents block. E: guard message now routes async (--dispatch --owner + await / Monitor + --watch) instead of flat never-background, block kept, 32/32 pack tests with new allow/block cases pinned; claude-rules.md fragment updated (pack pushed before render per convention). #78782 comment posted (issuecomment-5029376501): scheduler-gap framing, 8 sibling cross-links + #76203, the four-rung ladder verified on 2.1.214, park-rung-substitutes-wake conclusion. Ship note: trunk resolution refused on a foreign writing-docs-rewrite bookmark parked at main — resolved deliberately with --bookmark main. Next: Phase F — design review (opus, codex down), ship items (ldflags stamp, pack test in CI, install-binary.sh fragment, verify-comment, 1.0.0 bump), tag → release, then live matrix (mechanics provable now via failed-terminal runs; full-fidelity replies blocked on codex quota reset ~07-26).
